case_title: TAD NGUYEN VS. PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA - CONTRACTORS
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE (TRANSACTION ID # 57598468) FILED BY RESPONDENT CONTRACTORS' STATE LICENSE BOARD
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-08-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT CONTRACTORS' STATE LICENSE BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE IS SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Petitioner TAD NGUYEN, Tel No. 650-766-7342 appearing in pro per;
Deputy Attorney General CHAR SACHSON of the Office of the Attorney General, Tel No. 415-703-5558 appearing for Respondent Contractors' State License Board.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: RESPONDENT CONTRACTORS' STATE LICENSE BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
